prestazioni: Engine swap to a **F6A turbocharged** (3-cylinder, 657cc, DOHC 12V) with a **Garrett GT12 turbocharger**, custom **Tomei 264° camshafts**, and a **HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve** for optimized spool and boost response. Supporting mods include a **Nismo 550cc/min fuel injector set** and a **Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump** to handle E85 fuel blends.

Full **custom 4-link rear suspension** with **Poly Performance spherical rod ends** and **Currie Enterprises anti-wrap leaf springs** to eliminate axle wrap under hard launches. Front suspension upgraded with **King Shocks 2.0 remote-reservoir coilovers** and **Prothane polyurethane bushings** for precise articulation and durability.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **Advance Adapters SYE (Slip Yoke Eliminator)** and **Tom Woods double-cardan driveshaft** to handle increased torque. The transfer case is upgraded to a **RockTrac NP241OR** with **4:1 low-range gears**, paired with a **ARB Air Locker** in the rear and a **Detroit Truetrac** in the front for optimal off-road traction.
estetica: **Rally Art widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom vented hood, and rear quarter panels) with **custom aluminum inner fender liners** to accommodate 33x12.50R15 BFGoodrich KM3 tires on **Method MR701 beadlock wheels**.

**Custom front bumper** fabricated from 1.5-inch DOM tubing with a **Warn Zeon 10-S winch** and **PIAA 520 HID lights** integrated into the design. Rear bumper replaced with a **GenRight Off-Road rear bumper** featuring a **Swing-out tire carrier** and **RotopaX fuel/water can mounts**.

**Interior stripped and rebuilt** with a **Sparco Pro 2000 racing seat**, **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, and a **custom aluminum dashboard** housing **AEM X-Series gauges** (boost, EGT, wideband AFR). The roll cage is a **custom 4-point chromoly setup** by **Slee Off-Road**, with **Soundstream REF-9.2200D amplifier** and **Kicker 6.5-inch component speakers** for audio.
